description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a classic upright design with a prominent marquee at the top displaying the words 'GAMES TIME' in glowing neon-style letters. The control panel is adorned with vibrant, multicolored buttons and two joysticks, suggesting support for two players, and is decorated with a large game controller graphic and the word 'GAMES.' The screen area displays a colorful platform game scene, framed by a dark bezel. The side panels are covered in a playful, retro-themed pattern featuring pixel art icons, game controllers, handheld consoles, and geometric shapes in red, blue, green, yellow, and purple. The cabinet's front and lower section also feature neon-style 'TIME' lettering, matching the marquee. The overall build appears to be sturdy, likely constructed from wood or MDF with a laminate or vinyl wrap, and the surface is smooth and hard.
description: A vibrant, upright arcade game cabinet with neon-style 'GAMES TIME' signage, a colorful control panel for two players, and retro-themed side graphics featuring gaming icons.
description_view_0: Front view showing the glowing 'GAMES TIME' marquee, the detailed control panel with two joysticks and multiple colored buttons, and the game screen displaying a platform game.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the retro-themed side panel graphics with pixel art icons, game controllers, and handheld consoles, as well as the profile of the control panel and marquee.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full expanse of the patterned side panel artwork, with no visible controls or screen.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showcasing the colorful side panel graphics and the side profile of the control panel and marquee.
attribute_screen_type: unknown (screen appears flat and rectangular, but display technology is not visually identifiable)
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two joysticks and multiple colored buttons arranged for two-player side-by-side play, with a large game controller graphic and the word 'GAMES' on the panel.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the words 'GAMES TIME' in glowing neon-style letters on a dark background, matching the playful and retro theme of the cabinet.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Side panels are covered in a colorful, retro-themed pattern with pixel art icons, game controllers, handheld consoles, and geometric shapes in red, blue, green, yellow, and purple.
